title: STATE output includes unit counts for both sides
description: Extend the battle STATE response so it exposes both friendly and enemy unit counts, and update the client-side STATE display/parser to tolerate and show the new fields.
target_area: server state protocol and client state rendering
success_criteria: STATE messages include unit count fields or equivalent count logic for both sides.
Client STATE handling remains compatible with older responses that do not include the new fields.
No project files or UE visualization files are modified.
risk_points: Protocol field ordering can break existing clients.
Client display code may assume an exact parameter count.
